title: Incident Console Interface
description: Schema readiness for the incident console interface, covering incident list views, detail panels, status tracking, and severity filtering.

fields.name: incident_list_view_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for the incident list view columns and sorting

fields.name: incident_detail_panel_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for the incident detail panel layout and data fields

fields.name: incident_status_tracking_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for incident lifecycle status transitions

fields.name: severity_filter_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for filtering incidents by severity level

fields.name: incident_search_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for incident search and query capabilities

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No real incident tracking, no incident list display, no status mutation. Console remains non-functional until explicitly enabled.
